headline: Apple Announces Major Changes: New iPhone Models and Altered Release Schedule
summary: Apple has announced plans to roll out three new iPhone models within the next three years, marking a major transformation in the history of the device.

headline: Consumer Tech News (Nov 10-14): China Lifts Rare Earth Export Ban to U.S., Microsoft and Google Invest Billions in AI Data Centers & More
summary: China ends year-long gallium, germanium, and antimony export ban to the U.S., following the high-profile Trump-Xi meeting and trade negotiations. Microsoft invests $10B in AI data centers in Portugal and Atlanta; Alphabet allocates $6.4B for German infrastructure expansion.

headline: IREN, CoreWeave, And IonQ Are Among Top 10 Large Cap Losers Last Week (Nov. 10-Nov. 14): Are the Others in Your Portfolio?
summary: Ten large-cap names including IREN, CoreWeave, IonQ, Bloom Energy, Symbotic, and other tech/crypto/energy plays sank sharply last week on weak guidance, analyst downgrades, sector-wide tech and Bitcoin sell-offs, and mixed quarterly results.

headline: Tim Cook's Potential Successor, China's iPhone 17 Demand And More: This Week In Appleverse
summary: Apple saw major shifts this week, from leadership speculation to streaming moves and a strong iPhone 17 surge in China.

headline: White House Credits Doordash For Economic Insights, Elon Musk's Father Predicts America's Collapse And More: This Week In Politics
summary: A wave of political clashes and sharp commentary dominated the weekend's headlines.

headline: Jim Bianco Says Crypto On Track To Be Worst-Performing Asset Class Of 2025 If Bitcoin, Ethereum Remain In Red By End Of Year

headline: Elon Musk Says Teslas With AI5 Will Not Be Available In 'Sufficient Volume' Until Mid 2027: Why It Matters
summary: Tesla CEO Elon Musk announced that AI5 chips won't be available until mid-2027, delaying the company's transition to the new technology.

headline: Tesla Model Y Owner Says Safety Systems Protected Her, 3-Year-Old In Head-On Crash
summary: A Tesla Model Y owner says the vehicle's safety systems protected her and her 3-year-old son during a head-on crash.

headline: Ross Gerber Urges Apple Leadership Overhaul, Suggests Replacing Siri With Google's Gemini AI For Future Growth
summary: Investor Ross Gerber calls for new leadership and a partnership with Google's AI at Apple Inc. Gerber suggests replacing Siri with Gemini AI.

headline: Elon Musk Says 'Game On' As Tesla Robotaxi Rival Waymo Expands Operations
summary: Elon Musk responds to Waymo's expansion of self-driving operations in Bay Area. Waymo's fleet size referred to as 'rookie numbers' by Musk.

headline: Sundar Pichai's Cryptic Emoji Sends Gemini 3 Release Speculation Soaring In $800,000 Polymarket Bets
summary: Google's upcoming Gemini 3 AI model has sparked speculation after CEO Sundar Pichai's emoji response to prediction market betting.

headline: Elon Musk Says It's 'Mindblowing' How Much Money Is Being Spent On AI Compute As Google Announces $40 Billion Investment In Texas
summary: Elon Musk called Alphabet's $40 billion Texas investment in AI infrastructure "mind-blowing," highlighting the rapid growth of AI computing demand.

headline: Tesla Wants To Shift Away From China-Made Components For US Cars: Report
summary: Tesla requires suppliers to exclude Chinese parts for US car production. Despite challenges, aim to switch all parts within 1-2 years.

headline: Trump's Bond Buying Spree Surges Past $82 Million Since August
summary: Trump bought over $82 million in bonds, intersecting with sectors boosted by his policies. Disclosures show 175+ transactions.
